headline: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Launches Instacart Same Day Delivery From 2,400 Stores
summary: Tractor Supply (NasdaqGS:TSCO) has launched a nationwide partnership with Instacart. The agreement offers same-day delivery from over 2,400 Tractor Supply stores across the United States. The rollout expands access to Tractor Supply's assortment for customers who prefer online ordering and rapid delivery. For investors tracking Tractor Supply, the Instacart deal lands at a time when the stock has faced pressure, with the share price at $29.64 and the company down 41.7% year to date and...

headline: What To Expect From Tractor Supply’s (TSCO) Q2 Earnings
summary: Rural goods retailer Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) will be reporting earnings this Thursday morning. Here’s what investors should know.
